name: Queen Elizabeth Hospital
nhs_trust: The Queen Elizabeth Hospital King's Lynn NHS Foundation Trust
icb: NHS Norfolk and Waveney Integrated Care Board

road_access.approach_town: A149 / A10 from Hardwick roundabout → signed Hospital. Follow signs through Fairstead.
road_access.approach_gayton_road: Gayton Road runs east-west along the south edge of the campus. Main vehicle entrance on Gayton Road.
road_access.approach_rear: Barton Close / Elvington Road gives rear access — loading bay and zebra crossing on this side.
road_access.notes: Mini roundabout junction at Gayton Road / Winston Churchill Drive controls campus entry. Internal road has further mini roundabouts. Well signposted from most parts of King's Lynn.

entrances.label: Main entrance (Gayton Road)
entrances.notes: Primary vehicle and pedestrian access off Gayton Road. Zebra crossing on approach at 52.756651, 0.448170.

entrances.label: Rear entrance — Barton Close / Elvington Road
entrances.coord_source: Inferred from NHS website description 'Barton Close/Elvington via zebra crossing next to loading bay' and OSM zebra crossing node 52.756651,0.448170
entrances.notes: Loading bay adjacent. Zebra crossing provides pedestrian access. Rear of main building.

car_parks.label: Main car park (east)
car_parks.notes: East side of campus, closest to rear/Elvington entrance.

car_parks.label: South-central car park
car_parks.notes: Travel Hub / bus stop 'Queen Elizabeth Hospital, adj' is on the road adjacent to this car park.

car_parks.label: West car park (likely staff / permit)
car_parks.notes: Western campus, off Gayton Road. Access type not recorded in OSM.

bus_stops.label: Queen Elizabeth Hospital, adj
bus_stops.notes: On-site stop. Travel Hub is opposite Endoscopy Unit entrance — up to 10 buses/hour. Routes 33, 34, 41, loop 44, 48, 49, 49A.

internal_junctions.notes: Gayton Road / Winston Churchill Drive junction — main campus entry point
Winston Churchill Drive / William Booth Road junction

delivery.loading_bay_notes: Loading bay on Barton Close / Elvington Road side, rear of main building. Zebra crossing adjacent.
delivery.internal_road_notes: Enter via Gayton Road mini roundabout. Internal road follows campus perimeter. Mini roundabouts control flow — priority clockwise.
delivery.turning_notes: Three turning circles on campus: Gayton Road west end (52.75556,0.44193), north approach (52.75723,0.44307), and William Booth Road (52.75344,0.44481).
